calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-09-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Feb-09-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Kevin P. Whiteford, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Banc of America Leasing & Capital, LLC.
No appearance by defendant Blackfoot, Inc.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendant Charles Wesley was filed on October 6, 2009.
Default was entered against defendant Blackfoot, Inc. on July 15, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed on January 28, 2008.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on February 8, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Banc of America Leasing & Capital, LLC, and against the Defaulted Defendant Blackfoot, Inc. as follows:

Damages/Principal - $97,805.03.
Prejudgment Interest - $25,465.44.
Attorney's Fees - $1,312.00.
Costs - $381.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $124,963.97.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
